description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house set within a fenced lot, featuring a main building with multiple wings and a central circular driveway. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored brick, and the roof is composed of dark, gabled sections with several intersecting ridges. The property includes landscaped areas with trees and shrubs, and a prominent front entryway accessed by a short flight of steps. Windows are arranged in mostly symmetrical rows, with some variations on the side wings, and the house has several visible doors. The lot is enclosed by a dark perimeter fence, and the overall layout suggests a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood setting.
description: A large, two-story brick house with a dark gabled roof, central circular driveway, and landscaped yard, enclosed by a perimeter fence. The design features symmetrical window rows and a prominent front entryway with steps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular driveway, and symmetrical facade with central steps and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended wing, gabled roof sections, and additional landscaping along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, secondary entrances, and more trees within the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wing, roof complexity, and the continuation of the fence and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some asymmetrical side placements
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, double doors, and a small overhang, flanked by landscaping and a circular driveway
